<ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>恩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ēn</rt></ruby><ruby>惠<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby>、<ruby>平<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>安<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ān</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>归<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuī</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>！

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>常<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>感<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>谢<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiè</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>赐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>恩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ēn</rt></ruby><ruby>惠<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huì</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>又<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yòu</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>面<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">miàn</rt></ruby><ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>富<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>足<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zú</rt></ruby>，<ruby>口<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>才<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cái</rt></ruby>、<ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>识<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>全<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">quán</rt></ruby><ruby>备<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>正<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>坚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiān</rt></ruby><ruby>固<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡù</rt></ruby>，

<ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>致<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhì</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>恩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ēn</rt></ruby><ruby>赐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>及<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>等<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">děnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>显<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>现<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiàn</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>坚<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiān</rt></ruby><ruby>固<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡù</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>底<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>日<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rì</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>无<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wú</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>责<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zé</rt></ruby><ruby>备<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>实<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>原<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yuán</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>召<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhào</rt></ruby>，<ruby>好<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hǎo</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>份<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fèn</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>藉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiè</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>基<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Jī</rt></ruby><ruby>督<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dū</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mínɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>劝<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">quàn</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>话<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huà</rt></ruby>。<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>间<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiān</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>分<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>党<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dǎnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>只<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>彼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>相<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>合<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hé</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>革<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡé</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>氏<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>家<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>曾<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>提<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tí</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>弟<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>兄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xiōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shuō</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>间<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiān</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>纷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>争<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēnɡ</rt></ruby>。
